heading: Today
text: Some periods of morning sun.  Building clouds, with a rising chance of showers and thunderstorms, a few with heavy rain, more likely in the afternoon.  Highs in the upper 70s to mid 80s.  Light winds, becoming south near 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph through the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: A good chance of evening showers and thunderstorms, a few with heavy rain, decreasing overnight.  Warm and humid.  Lows in the 60s.  Winds south near 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys, diminishing to light east of the Green Mountains.

heading: Thursday
text: Morning clouds breaking for periods of sun.  Warm and humid.  A chance of scattered showers and thunderstorms, more so in the afternoon.  Highs in the 80s.  Winds light and variable.
